accurate.why: All project locations, descriptions, and dollar amounts match the bill text exactly.

no_hallucinations.why: No fabricated or incorrect claims; every detail traces directly to the bill text.

states_purpose.why: Clearly identifies the act as authorizing VA major medical facility projects for FY2024 and appropriations therefor.

changes_to_existing_law.why: The act provides new project-specific authorization rather than amending existing law.

exceptions_conditions.why: Correctly notes the per-project spending caps ('not to exceed' amounts) for each of the 11 projects.

effective_dates.why: Notes the FY2024 authorization period and the November 25, 2024, approval date.

major_provisions_covered.why: Covers all 11 authorized projects with their locations, scope, and dollar limits, plus the total appropriation authorization.

concise.why: Exhaustively lists every project detail; while accurate, it exceeds what a summary requires and could be more condensed.

correct_entities.why: Secretary of Veterans Affairs, Department of Veterans Affairs, and all project locations correctly named.

correct_figures.why: All per-project dollar amounts and the total $3,354,048,000 appropriation authorization match the bill text.

judged_via: claude-sonnet-4-6 via parallel Claude Code subagents (web/knowledge-verified context)
